prompt: Replace the background of the chat area in image 1 with the peach color from image 2, and update the 'Delivered' grey icon the lower-right corners of each green bubble with the 'Read' blue icon from image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Replace the background pattern of the chat conversation area with the solid peach color from image 2. objects: Chat conversation area with a solid peach background
'Read' double blue checkmark icons in the lower-right corner of green message bubbles
'Delivered' double grey checkmark icons in the lower-right corner of grey/purple message bubbles
Text and emojis within message bubbles
Original background pattern of the chat conversation area (should not be present)
